summary: Battle Command now explains autonomous brigade behavior with detailed Japanese reason strings in the selected panel, unit cards, and map tokens.

observations.selectedSummary: 基準 X34 Y23 / 半径17 後退 X16 Y28 / 自動後退あり 現在行動 基準位置を保持 判断理由 保持判断: 森林左翼線 / 基準距離0 / 地形森林遮蔽帯
examples: 保持判断: 森林左翼線 / 基準距離0 / 地形森林遮蔽帯
修理判断: 塹壕線 修理または損傷施設へ移動

mobileQa.reason: Mobile-specific QA is no longer a current gate by user direction on 2026-07-03.

implementedBehavior: Derives reason detail from BattleUnit.actionReason and StandingOrder state.
Includes current target, facility assignment, fallback thresholds, terrain, and line-of-sight context where relevant.
Shows the selected brigade's reason in the command summary.
Shows each brigade's reason in the command card and player map token.
knownLimitations: Reason strings are UI-derived from existing battle state; no new planner trace model is stored yet.
Enemy-side reasoning remains limited to existing assault/command/morale labels.
